chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 42 of 2019 ________________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________________________ For hearing of main petition. 29th March, 2019 Mr. Raja Ali Asghar, Advocate for petitioner. ====================== This petition seeking the issuance of a Letter of Administration has been filed in connection with the estate of Mirza Mohammad Siddique, who expired on 17-12-2017. According to the petition, the deceased has left behind the following legal heirs: Mirza Noman Baig Son Mirza Shahab Baig Son Mirza Khawar Baig Son Mirza Amir Baig Son Uzma Waheed Abbasi Daughter The note of the Deputy Registrar (OS) dated 21-2-2019 shows that all formalities have been completed. The witnesses are present in Court today in person and confirm the contents of the petition. Legal heirs Noman, Khawar and Amir Baig are also present in person whereas Shahab and Uzma have executed powers of attorney in favour of their brother Noman. This is a not contested matter and no objections have been received to date after publication. In view of the foregoing there appears to be no impediment to issue a Letter of Administration. Office to do the needful subject to rules. JUDGE
